_comment: Path-traversal payloads aimed at routes that take a path parameter (e.g. /findings/{id}, /scan-runs/{id}, /conversations/{id}, /actions/{id}/...). PASS = 400/404 with a clean JSON body. FAIL = 500 OR 200 with a directory listing OR any leaked filesystem content. Payloads cover dot-slash variants, URL-encoded and double-encoded forms, Windows backslash, and a few mixed-case bypass variants.

payloads.rationale: Windows-style backslash path — defends against naive replace('/', '_') sanitizers.
Mix of encoded and literal slashes — defeats single-pass decoders.
Absolute path attempt as path-param value.
